description.text: Defines the Asset Administration Shell container for this template package.

displayName.text: Process Variables For Manufacturing KPI Calculation

description.text: Defines the template submodel for process variables used in manufacturing KPI calculation.
Groups the data points for actual personnel work time, including key, current value, and comment.
Provides optional comments for actual personnel work time.

qualifiers.value: The actual personnel work time shall be the time that a worker needs for the execution of a production order.

description.text: Groups the data points for actual unit processing time, including key, current value, and comment.
Provides optional comments for actual unit processing time.

qualifiers.value: The actual unit processing time shall be the actual production time plus the actual unit setup time.

description.text: Groups the data points for actual unit busy time, including key, current value, and comment.
Provides optional comments for actual unit busy time.

qualifiers.value: The actual unit busy time shall be the actual time that a work unit is used for the execution of a production order.

description.text: Groups the data points for actual order execution time, including key, current value, and comment.
Provides optional comments for actual order execution time.

qualifiers.value: The actual order execution time shall be the time difference between start time and end time of a production order. It includes the actual busy time, the actual transport time and the actual queuing time.

description.text: Groups the data points for actual personnel attendance time, including key, current value, and comment.
Provides optional comments for actual personnel attendance time.

qualifiers.value: The actual personnel attendance time shall be the actual time that a worker is available to work on production orders. It does not include actual time for company authorized break periods (e.g. lunch). It shall be the difference between login and logout excluding breaks.

description.text: Groups the data points for actual production time, including key, current value, and comment.
Provides optional comments for actual production time.

qualifiers.value: The actual production time shall be the actual time during which a work unit is producing. It includes only the value-adding functions.

description.text: Groups the data points for actual queuing time, including key, current value, and comment.
Provides optional comments for actual queuing time.

qualifiers.value: The actual queuing time shall be the actual time when the work unit is not executing order production although its available.

description.text: Groups the data points for actual unit down time, including key, current value, and comment.
Provides optional comments for actual unit down time.

qualifiers.value: The actual unit down time shall be the actual time when the work unit is not execution order production although it is available.

description.text: Groups the data points for actual unit delay time, including key, current value, and comment.
Provides optional comments for actual unit delay time.

qualifiers.value: The actual unit delay time shall be the actual time associated with malfunction-caused interruptions, minor stoppages, and other unplanned time intervals that occur while tasks are being completed that lead to unwanted extension of the order processing time.

description.text: Groups the data points for actual unit setup time, including key, current value, and comment.
Provides optional comments for actual unit setup time.

qualifiers.value: The actual unit setup time shall be the time consumed for the preparation of an order at a work unit.

description.text: Groups the data points for actual transport time, including key, current value, and comment.
Provides optional comments for actual transport time.

qualifiers.value: The actual transport time shall be the actual time required for transport between work units.

description.text: Groups the data points for good part, including key, current value, and comment.
Provides optional comments for good part.

qualifiers.value: A good part shall be the count of individual identifiable parts, e.g. by serialization, which meets the quality requirements.

description.text: Groups the data points for inspected part, including key, current value, and comment.
Provides optional comments for inspected part.

qualifiers.value: An inspected part shall be the count of individual identifiable parts, e.g., by serialization, which was tested against the quality requirements.

description.text: Groups the data points for scrap quantity, including key, current value, and comment.
Provides optional comments for scrap quantity.

qualifiers.value: The scrap quantity shall be the planned quantity of products for a production order (lot size, production order quantity).

description.text: Groups the data points for good quantity, including key, current value, and comment.
Provides optional comments for good quantity.

qualifiers.value: The good quantity shall be the produced quantity that meets quality requirements.

description.text: Groups the data points for rework quantity, including key, current value, and comment.
Provides optional comments for rework quantity.

qualifiers.value: The rework quantity shall be the quantity that fails to meet the quantity requirements, but where these requirements can be met by subsequent work.

description.text: Groups the data points for produced quantity, including key, current value, and comment.
Provides optional comments for produced quantity.

qualifiers.value: The produced quantity shall be the quantity that a work unit has produced in relation to a production order.

description.text: Groups the data points for planned busy time, including key, current value, and comment.
Provides optional comments for planned busy time.

qualifiers.value: The planned busy time shall be the planned operation time minus the planned downtime.

description.text: Groups the data points for planned runtime per item, including key, current value, and comment.
Provides optional comments for planned runtime per item.

qualifiers.value: The planned run time per item shall be the planned time for producing one quantity unit.
